channel.title: Sam Ngo - Blog & Projects
channel.description: Tips, tutorials, and insights on Excel, VBA, and data visualization.

item.title: fn_Sum_by_Color: Sum Cells by Fill Color
item.description: Sum cells whose background color matches a reference cell. Ideal for color-coded financial models.

item.title: fn_Range_Has_Notes: Detect Cell Comments
item.description: Returns a TRUE/FALSE array indicating which cells have legacy comments attached.

item.title: fn_Extract_Comments_Thread: Export Threaded Comments
item.description: Extract all threaded comments and replies into a structured table with Cell, Author, Date, and Text columns.

item.title: fn_NMATCH: Find the Nth Occurrence
item.description: Like MATCH but finds the Nth occurrence of a value in a range.

item.title: fn_ROTATE: Rotate a 2D Range 90 Degrees
item.description: Rotate any 2D range clockwise with an optional count for 180 or 270 degree rotations.

item.title: fn_Does_File_Path_Exist: Check File Paths from Cells
item.description: Returns TRUE/FALSE for each cell, checking whether the file path actually exists on disk.

item.title: fn_Is_Hyperlink: Detect Hyperlinks in Cells
item.description: Returns TRUE/FALSE indicating whether each cell contains a hyperlink.

item.title: Workbook Statistics Report Generator
item.description: Generate comprehensive stats: formula density, dynamic arrays, unique formulae, and cross-sheet dependencies.

item.title: Dynamic Array Spill Resolver
item.description: Automatically detect and fix #SPILL! errors by inserting rows and columns where dynamic arrays need space.

item.title: Audit & Formula Tracing Tools
item.description: Enhanced Trace Dependents/Precedents with safety checks and a Toggle R1C1 reference style switch.

item.title: Clipboard Power Tools
item.description: Copy cell addresses, formulas as text, and select ranges from clipboard text using the Windows API.

item.title: Workbook Error Scanner
item.description: Scan every sheet for #REF!, #VALUE!, #N/A and all other errors with a clickable hyperlinked report.

item.title: Data Validation Inspector
item.description: List all data validation rules and find cells that violate their own validation constraints.

item.title: Workbook Documentation Suite
item.description: Document named ranges, embedded objects, unique formulas, and chart series across workbooks.

item.title: Power Query Manager
item.description: Extract, export, import, and remove Power Query definitions with VBA.

item.title: Text Case Transformations
item.description: Six in-place text case macros: UPPER, lower, Proper, Title Case, tOGGLE, and Sentence case.

item.title: Auto-Grouping Rows by Title Hierarchy
item.description: Automatically create outline groups from 2 to 8 levels based on column title positions.

item.title: Auto Save & Version Control
item.description: Timed auto-save and automatic version numbering with initials prefix.

item.title: VBA Code Inspector
item.description: List every Sub, Function, and Property across all open workbooks.

item.title: Mass Naming & Hyperlink Tools
item.description: Bulk-create numbered named ranges, convert cell references to names, and add hyperlinks.

item.title: Smart Fill in All Four Directions
item.description: Fill blank cells from the nearest value in any direction: down, up, right, or left.

item.title: Formula Calculation Timer
item.description: Measure single-cell recalculation time or full workbook rebuild time for performance tuning.

item.title: Fill Blank Cells to the Left
item.description: A VBA macro to fill blank cells with the value from the nearest non-blank cell to the right.

item.title: Automating Sheet Setup
item.description: Reset all sheets to A1 with 100% zoom for a clean workbook presentation.

item.title: Removing Same-Sheet References
item.description: Clean up redundant same-sheet references in formulas automatically.

item.title: Bubble Pies Chart
item.description: Overlay mini pie charts on a bubble chart to show market positioning, scale, and sector composition.

item.title: Marimekko Chart
item.description: Variable-width stacked bar chart for market share and product mix analysis.

item.title: Percentage Change Column Chart
item.description: Column chart with year-over-year variance arrows and percentage labels.

item.title: Waffle Charts in Excel
item.description: 10x10 grid percentage visualisation using SEQUENCE and conditional formatting.

item.title: Horizontal RainCloud Charts
item.description: Distribution visualisation combining density curves, box plots, and scatter plots in Excel.

item.title: Vertical RainCloud Charts
item.description: Vertical RainCloud chart with 1-cloud and 3-cloud layouts in Excel.

item.title: Point & Figure Chart with Bollinger Bands
item.description: Classic technical analysis chart built from MSFT stock data with Bollinger Band overlays.

item.title: Christmas Tree Light Generator
item.description: A festive Excel creation with randomised Unicode ornaments and conditional formatting lights.

item.title: Matrix Manipulation Formula Engine
item.description: Compare 8 formula approaches to 2D aggregation: MMULT, SUMIFS, GROUPBY, and LAMBDA variants.

item.title: Subset Sum Problem with Excel Formulas
item.description: Find all number combinations that sum to a target using SEQUENCE, BASE, MMULT, and FILTER.

item.title: Dynamic Hyperlinks That Never Break
item.description: Formula-driven hyperlinks using HYPERLINK(), INDIRECT(), and CELL() that auto-update.
